name: Cafe House
title: Cafe House Template
description: Multi-page cafe/restaurant template with warm gold and dark tones. Opens with a split-screen preloader animation. The header features a coffee cup logo image, handwriting-font site name, and a horizontal navigation (Home, Today Special, Menu, Contact). The welcome section has decorative hanging light images, a handwriting-font welcome heading with decorative line images, gold subtitle, description text, a Details button, and a table-set illustration. The main content on light gray background contains: a section with circular thumbnail and heading; a Popular Items section showing 3 coffee items (Americano, Cappuccino, Mocha) each with photo, handwriting-font title with enlarged first letter, description, and Order Now link; a Today Special section with an asymmetric image grid with hover overlay descriptions; a Daily Menu section with a menu board image and ordered list. The dark footer has 3 columns: Main Menu links, About Us text, and social media icons.

typography.style: Dual-font system with Damion handwriting for section headers and Open Sans for body text

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 3 grid. Full-width welcome section with decorative elements. 9+3 column layout for about section. Asymmetric image grid for specials. 3-column footer. Multi-page with separate HTML files.
visualStyle: Warm, inviting cafe atmosphere with gold accents on light gray. Handwriting font headers evoke chalkboard menus. Decorative hanging lights and table-set illustrations. Dark footer contrasts with light main content.

name: Eatery
title: Eatery Cafe and Restaurant Template
description: Restaurant and cafe single-page template with a fixed top navbar featuring logo, navigation links (Home, About, Chef, Menu, Contact), phone number, and Reserve a table CTA button. Hero section uses an Owl Carousel slider with 3 fullscreen background image slides, each with a subtitle, large heading, and CTA button. About section splits into a 2-column layout: left column with story text, right column with a food image. Chef/Team section displays 3 team member cards in a 3-column grid, each with a photo, hover overlay with social links, name, and role. Menu section shows 6 food items in a 3-column grid, each card with a food photo, dish name, ingredients, and price badge, with Magnific Popup lightbox on click. Testimonials section has a parallax background with dark overlay and a carousel of customer quotes. Contact section features a 2-column layout with embedded Google Map iframe on the left and a contact form on the right. Footer has 4 columns: address, reservation info, open hours, and social icons.

typography.textTransform: uppercase on nav and section titles
typography.style: Clean sans-serif with uppercase accents, warm restaurant feel

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 3 grid, container-based layout at 1170px max. Fixed top navbar. Fullscreen hero slider. Two-column about and contact sections. Three-column team and menu grids. Parallax backgrounds via Stellar.js.
visualStyle: Warm, inviting restaurant aesthetic with red accent color, parallax food photography backgrounds, clean white content sections, and hover effects on team and menu cards.

name: Grill
title: Grill Responsive Web Template
description: Multi-page restaurant/food e-commerce template with a clean white design. Top utility bar (dark gray) with Home/Account links and shopping cart info. Main header has logo image, centered 4-link navigation, and a search box. FlexSlider image carousel with 3 food slides and overlay captions. Services section with 4-column grid of service items with Font Awesome circle icons. Latest Blog section with 6 blog post cards in a 3-column grid. Testimonials slider section. Newsletter subscription form. Footer with 4 columns (About, Links, Social, Contact info).

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with bold uppercase headings and regular body text

layoutDetails: Bootstrap container. Multi-page structure. FlexSlider for hero carousel. 4-column service grid. 3-column blog grid. 4-column footer layout.
visualStyle: Clean white restaurant template with warm orange accents, food imagery slider, and organized content sections.

name: Klassy Cafe
title: Klassy Cafe - Restaurant HTML Template
description: Restaurant/cafe single-page template with preloader animation and sticky header navigation featuring logo image and 6 links (Home, About, Menu, Chefs, Features dropdown, Contact Us). Hero section uses split layout: left 4-column panel with cafe name, tagline, and Make A Reservation button; right 8-column area with Owl Carousel image slider. About section has 2-column layout with section heading, descriptive text, 3 small thumbnail images, and a video thumbnail with play button overlay. Menu section displays an Owl Carousel of 6 menu item cards with background images, price badges ($14-$22), titles, descriptions, and Make Reservation links. Chefs section shows 3 chef cards with hover overlay revealing social media icons, chef photo, name, and role. Reservation/Contact section with 2-column layout: left has reservation form (name, email, phone, date, time, guests) and right has Google Maps embed. Footer with 3-column layout and bottom copyright bar.

typography.style: Modern Poppins with Dancing Script cursive for elegant restaurant branding

layoutDetails: Sticky header with scroll-triggered background change. Split hero (4-col + 8-col). Container-based sections with generous padding. Owl Carousel for menu items and hero slider. Responsive collapses at 991px and 767px.
visualStyle: Warm and elegant restaurant aesthetic with golden amber accents on white. Food photography-driven with carousel displays. Chef cards with social hover overlays. Cursive script font adds sophistication.

name: Pizza
title: Pizza - free responsive website template
description: Restaurant/pizza shop single-page template with a warm, food-focused design. Features a fixed top navigation bar with bold brand name and smooth-scroll links. Hero section uses a FlexSlider image carousel with overlay captions. About section presents a two-column layout with text and bordered food image. Gallery section displays a mixed grid of food photography with hover overlay descriptions on a light gray background. Contact section includes a two-column form layout, address with opening hours, and social media links.

typography.style: Playful display font (Chewy) for branding with clean body text (Signika)

layoutDetails: Single-page scrolling layout with fixed navbar and smooth scroll. Full-width FlexSlider hero carousel. Bootstrap 3 grid for content sections. Gallery uses mixed 3-column and 2-column rows.
visualStyle: Warm restaurant aesthetic with food photography. Dark navbar contrasts with light content. Image hover overlays with descriptions. Bordered images, clean spacing. Playful typography.

name: Victory
title: Victory HTML CSS Template
description: Restaurant multi-page template with a dark header navbar and full-width hero banner featuring food imagery. Hero section has centered text with 'Asian Restaurant' branding and an order CTA button. Cook Delicious section shows food images with descriptive text in a two-column layout. Menu section displays food items in a grid with images, names, and prices. Book a Table section has a reservation form with date/time fields. Blog section with post cards. Footer has multi-column layout with contact info, opening hours, and social links. Warm coral/salmon (#f2745f) accent color with Roboto and Spectral fonts.

typography.style: Dual font pairing — Roboto for body, Spectral serif for decorative headings. Professional restaurant feel.

layoutDetails: Full-width hero banner, container-width content sections. Multi-page with Home, Menus, Blog, Contact pages. Grid-based menu items and blog posts. Bootstrap 3 grid.
visualStyle: Warm and inviting restaurant design. Coral accent on white backgrounds. Food photography focus. Clean card layouts for menu items. Dark footer with multi-column info.

name: Antique Cafe
title: Antique Bakery Cafe HTML Template by Tooplate
description: Antique bakery cafe template with a warm, rustic parallax design. Built with Tailwind CSS, the page features multiple full-viewport parallax sections with rich background images of coffee and bakery scenes. A fixed navigation bar with gold-colored links sits at the top. The intro section has a centered logo heading with Oswald font on a dark semi-transparent overlay. A cafe menu section displays food items in brown-themed cards with item images, names, sizes, and prices arranged in a flex layout. An about section presents the cafe story in white semi-transparent cards. A contact section with a form uses dark semi-transparent backgrounds. The footer shows copyright info. Custom color palette with gold (#CC9966), brown (#544639), teal green (#006666), and yellow (#FC6) accents creates a warm, vintage cafe atmosphere.
layoutDetails: Full-viewport parallax sections stacked vertically. Each section has a different background image with parallax scrolling. Content centered within max-width containers. Fixed navigation overlay. Flex-based card layouts within sections.
visualStyle: Warm rustic cafe with parallax scrolling, dark overlays on rich photography, gold and brown color palette, and vintage typography. Semi-transparent content cards over full-bleed images create depth. Cozy and inviting atmosphere.

typography.style: Oswald display font for logo/headings with Raleway light body text. Tailwind utility classes for sizing. Light font weight for elegant, airy feel.

name: Barista Cafe
title: Barista Cafe HTML CSS Template
description: Cafe/coffee shop website with a hero section featuring a Vegas.js background slideshow and centered heading with CTA buttons. Navigation links to Home, About, Our Menu, Reviews, and Contact sections. About section includes a video player area with descriptive text. Team section displays four staff members in card layout with photos and bios. Menu section shows food/drink items with names, descriptions, and prices in a structured grid. Reviews section features three customer testimonials with profile photos and star ratings. Contact section has an embedded Google Map and contact form. Warm brown/earth-tone color palette.

typography.style: Modern geometric sans-serif (Plus Jakarta Sans). Clean and warm. Suitable for food/hospitality branding.

layoutDetails: Single-page vertical scroll with full-width hero slideshow. Bootstrap 5 grid. About uses two-column layout with video. Team in 4-column card grid. Menu uses structured list with prices. Reviews in 3-column layout. Contact has map + form.
visualStyle: Warm and inviting cafe aesthetic with earth-tone browns and tans. Vegas.js background slideshow in hero. Team member cards with hover effects. Structured menu with pricing. Customer testimonials with star ratings.

name: Bistro Elegance
title: Bistro Elegance - Fine Dining Experience
description: Fine dining restaurant website with an elegant, upscale aesthetic. Hero section with a large background image and centered restaurant name with tagline. Navigation links to Home, Menu, Reservations, and Contact. Menu section displays dishes organized by category with names, descriptions, and prices. Reservation section features a detailed booking form with fields for name, email, phone, date, time, number of guests, and special requests. Contact section with restaurant address, hours, and an embedded Google Map. Modal popup for ingredient details. Red (#e74c3c) accent color on clean white backgrounds.

typography.style: System font stack (Arial). Clean and readable. Bold headings with uppercase section titles.

layoutDetails: Single-page scroll with smooth navigation. Hero is full-viewport with centered content. Menu uses card-based grid layout. Reservation form centered with structured fields. Contact has map + info side by side.
visualStyle: Elegant fine dining aesthetic with vibrant red accents on clean white. Gradient backgrounds add depth. Card-based menu layout with prices. Detailed reservation form. Modal for ingredient details. Sophisticated restaurant design.

name: Brunch
title: Brunch HTML Template
description: Restaurant/brunch venue template with a vibrant blue (#517df0) primary color. Features a fixed header with hamburger navigation menu. Hero banner section with large background image. Content sections include menu highlights with food photography, date picker for reservations, video background section, testimonials with Owl Carousel, and a contact area. Montserrat font throughout. Multiple page sections with alternating white and blue backgrounds. Datepicker widget for booking dates. Video container for promotional content.

typography.style: Modern geometric sans-serif (Montserrat). Bold uppercase headings. Clean and contemporary.

layoutDetails: Single-page with fixed header navigation. Full-width hero banner. Content sections alternate between white and colored backgrounds. Datepicker widget inline. Video section with background video. Owl Carousel for testimonials.
visualStyle: Vibrant blue (#517df0) branding on clean white. Modern restaurant aesthetic with strong color blocks. Owl Carousel testimonials. Datepicker for reservations. Video background section. Bold Montserrat typography.

name: Chilling Cafe
title: Chilling Cafe by Tooplate
description: Compact cafe/coffee shop template with a slate blue-gray (#3a4a58) color scheme. Simple multi-section layout featuring a hero area with cafe branding and an intro image. Content sections display cafe information, menu highlights, and ambiance photography. No contact form or complex interactions. Purely informational. Open Sans font throughout. Muted earth tones with slate blue-gray, warm brown (#996633), and soft gray backgrounds. Clean, minimal design focused on showcasing the cafe atmosphere.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif (Open Sans). Semi-bold headings. Matches the understated cafe aesthetic.

layoutDetails: Simple single-page layout with stacked sections. No complex grid or navigation. Hero with background color. Content sections with alternating gray-blue backgrounds. Straightforward vertical flow.
visualStyle: Understated and cozy with slate blue-gray and warm brown tones. Muted earth-tone palette. No flashy animations or complex interactions. Clean, minimal cafe aesthetic focused on atmosphere.

name: Crispy Kitchen
title: Crispy Kitchen - Bootstrap 5 HTML Template
description: Food/recipe website template for a kitchen/cooking brand. Bootstrap 5 carousel hero with multiple food photography slides and captions. Navigation with links to multiple pages. Featured recipes section with image cards showing dish photos, titles, and descriptions. Booking modal with a reservation form (name, email, phone, guests, date, time, message). Video embed section for cooking tutorials. Customer testimonials. Google Maps embed for location. Newsletter subscription. Montserrat font throughout. Warm food photography with clean white backgrounds.

typography.style: Modern geometric sans-serif (Montserrat). Bold headings. Clean and appetizing for food/recipe content.

layoutDetails: Multi-page with Bootstrap 5 carousel hero. Recipe cards in responsive grid. Booking modal overlay. Video section centered. Testimonials in card layout. Map full-width embed. Newsletter form in colored section.
visualStyle: Warm and appetizing food website with coral red (#f44749) and amber (#f3af24) accents. Bootstrap carousel hero with food photography. Recipe cards with hover effects. Booking modal. Clean, inviting kitchen aesthetic.

name: Nexus Brew
title: Nexus Brew - Cyberpunk Cafe
description: Cyberpunk-themed cafe/restaurant template with dark neon aesthetic. Hero with large glitch-effect title and dual CTA buttons. Menu section with two-column layout for Hot Drinks and Cold Drinks, each with item names and prices. Specialty section with four cards featuring emoji icons and descriptions. About section with cafe story. Contact section with form. Animated background shapes, hex pattern overlay, and grid overlay create layered depth. Neon pink, blue, and purple gradients throughout. Orbitron and Share Tech Mono fonts for futuristic feel.

typography.style: Futuristic display fonts with neon gradient text effects. Monospace for menu items.

layoutDetails: Single-page scrolling with full-width sections. Fixed navbar. Layered background with hex patterns, grid overlay, and animated shapes. Menu in two-column grid. Specialty in 4-card grid.
visualStyle: Cyberpunk cafe aesthetic with dark background, neon gradients, glitch text effects, hex patterns, and animated background shapes. Futuristic and immersive.

name: Steak House
title: Steak House - Free HTML Template
description: Restaurant single-page with fullscreen parallax hero, gradient overlay, animated CTA. Sticky nav. Three icon-text features. About with image, FlexSlider, text. YouTube video popup over parallax. Six-item food menu with thumbnails and prices. Three chef photos. Nivo Lightbox gallery. Contact form with social links.

typography.style: Bold Montserrat headings with light body

layoutDetails: Single-page with parallax. Sticky nav. Three-column features. Two-column menu. Three-column team. Gallery.
visualStyle: Elegant dark restaurant with parallax, gold accent. Food menu with prices. Video popup.

name: Wave Cafe
title: Wave Cafe HTML Template by Tooplate
description: Cafe single-page with fixed left sidebar containing coffee icon logo, site name, and vertical icon+text navigation. Right content with tabbed drink menus (Iced Coffee, Hot Coffee, Fruit Juice) showing item cards with square thumbnails, names, prices, descriptions. About page with image-text blocks. Special Items page. Contact form. Video background behind entire layout. Dark semi-transparent content boxes.
layoutDetails: Fixed left sidebar with icon nav. Right content with tabbed drink menus. Video background. Dark overlay boxes.
visualStyle: Dark cafe with video background, fixed sidebar, tabbed menus with prices. Yellow accent.
